text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as Satono Diamond's debut race draws
near...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I don't mean to overstep, but there is something I
felt you should know.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Satono's debut race is likely to attract a great
deal of attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen holds out a magazine with the
attention-grabbing headline "The
500-Million-RKST-Point Debut Race!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
RKST—the acronym stands for "Rookie
Knowledge, Stats, and Talent."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
RKST points are announced annually in July and
refer to an Umamusume's evaluation points
before they debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The points are determined by retired trainers and
racing critics who analyze the abilities of
Umamusume and convert their evaluations into
numerical scores.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond earned a staggering 230 million
points, putting her among the highest ranking
Umamusume in history. Furthermore, she's been
garnering huge attention leading up to her debut.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Another Umamusume with an even higher
evaluation score than Satono will be running in
the same debut race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Other high-scoring Umamusume will be
competing too. Collectively, the total points from
all racers exceed 500 million.
choice_data_list:
So that's why it's being called the
"500-Million-Point Battle," huh?

So that's why it's being called the
"500-Million-Point Battle," huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I suspect public attention will continue to
escalate, but Satono should be fine.
Nevertheless, I wished to let you know.
choice_data_list: Thanks for the heads up. We'll be careful.
Thanks for the heads up. We'll be careful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter how self-assured and composed
Satono Diamond usually is, this is her debut race,
so it's prudent to be overly cautious.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Good. With so many eyes on her, it's only natural
for dissenting opinions on her to arise.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Trainer, let's make today a good one!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Hey, Satono Diamond is here!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
There sure are a lot of reporters out and about
today...

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond, could we have a few minutes of
your time, please?
choice_data_list: Sorry, we're just about to start training...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: It's fine, Trainer. I don't mind a short interview.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much! Your upcoming debut looks
set to be a showdown between you and several
other high-scoring Umamusume. What are your
thoughts going into it?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh, is that what people are saying?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm ecstatic to be on the receiving end of so much
attention, and I plan to put on a performance
worthy of my score during my debut.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: Are you feeling any pressure?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I think everyone is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond handles the questions flawlessly.
She seems wholly nonplussed by the hype
surrounding the high-point showdown.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Whew...
Sorry for the wait. I'm done now.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Well, my throat is a little dry.
choice_data_list: Should I put a cap on interviews for you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This period leading up to her debut is a critical
one. If we ask, I'm sure Tazuna can limit how many
interviews we receive.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
No, it's fine. Giving interviews is part and parcel
of being a runner.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
In fact, it's a blessing if it gets everyone excited
for my debut.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure my family is thankful for the attention as
well!
choice_data_list: Isn't being in the spotlight a burden?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm very used to it. I've been the center of
attention in the Satono family since I was young.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
On occasion, people would bombard me at
parties with questions on my lap times or if I
planned to attend Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Other Umamusume, including my relatives, were
often envious of the spotlight that followed
me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She shows no signs of feeling any pressure. It
seems she really is used to the attention.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh, but do you find the interviews irksome?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm happy to refuse them if they're interfering
with my training.
choice_data_list:
That's okay! I don't have any complaints if you
don't!

That's okay! I don't have any complaints if you
don't!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's the one worrying about me instead of the
other way around. If she isn't bothered, it's
probably best not to dwell on it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the day of her debut race arrives...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: It's finally time!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I am. When I think about how my adventures in
the Twinkle Series are finally beginning...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but get chills and goosebumps all
over!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond doesn't show the slightest sign
of nerves. Instead, she's overflowing with
enthusiasm.
choice_data_list:
Get out there and show them you mean
business!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Absolutely! Satono Diamond, moving out!
